children.heading: .—Selected Reserve
children.label: a .—Selected Reserve
children.text: A person who is required under an agreement under to serve in the Selected Reserve shall serve not less than 12 days of active duty for training each year during the period of service required by the agreement.section 16201 of this title
not less than 30 days of initial active duty for training; and
not less than five days of active duty for training each year during the period of service required by the agreement.
